steps.check: The fastener turns freely.
steps.instruction: Place a paper fastener at H6.
steps.title: Start at H6

steps.check: Drive G3 spins without rubbing.
steps.instruction: Add one S10 spacer, then place drive G3 on H6.
steps.title: Add drive G3 gear

steps.check: Both gears turn when drive G3 turns.
steps.instruction: Place output G3 at H9 so it touches drive G3 lightly.
steps.title: Add output G3 gear

steps.check: If the mesh binds, loosen both fasteners.
steps.instruction: Use a handle hole on drive G3 and rotate slowly.
steps.title: Turn the handle hole

steps.check: The axle is loose enough to rotate.
steps.instruction: Place a paper fastener at J7.
steps.title: Mount cam axle

steps.check: The cam turns cleanly.
steps.instruction: Add S10 spacer, then place the eccentric cam at J7.
steps.title: Add eccentric cam

steps.check: The follower can slide up and down.
steps.instruction: Pin the follower guide slot at G7 with a loose spacer stack.
steps.title: Add follower guide

steps.check: Loosen the guide if it sticks.
steps.instruction: Turn the cam and watch the follower rise.
steps.title: Check lift

steps.check: Both ground pivots are fixed.
steps.instruction: Pin ground pivots at I5 and I9.

stack.label: Repeat this stack at I5, I9

steps.title: Set ground pivots

steps.check: The input link swings freely.
steps.instruction: Place L2 from I5 toward G6 with spacers.
steps.title: Add input link

steps.check: The coupler moves without scraping.
steps.instruction: Join L4 to the free input-link hole near G6, then point the other end toward G10.
steps.title: Add coupler

steps.check: All pivots move when the input link turns.
steps.instruction: Place L2 from G10 back to I9.
steps.title: Close output link

steps.check: The G10 joint floats with the links and is not pinned to the board.
steps.instruction: Fasten the L4 coupler to the free output-link hole near G10 only (not the board).
steps.title: Join output to coupler

steps.check: The axle is straight.
steps.instruction: Place the drive gear fastener at I6.
steps.title: Mount drive gear

steps.check: Drive G3 rotates freely.
steps.instruction: Add S10 spacer, then place drive G3 at I6.
steps.title: Add drive G3 gear

steps.check: The gears move together.
steps.instruction: Place output G3 at I9 and mesh it with drive G3.
steps.title: Mesh output G3 gear

steps.check: The linkage rides around the gear center instead of locking to the board.
steps.instruction: Fasten L4 through an off-center output G3 handle hole only (not the board), then point the free end toward I12.
steps.title: Add linkage output

steps.check: The bracket follows the linkage end and is not pinned to the board.
steps.instruction: Fasten the 2-hole bracket to the free L4 end near I12 as a moving handle.
steps.title: Add output connector

steps.check: The center axle is straight and fixed.
steps.instruction: Place the sun gear fastener at H8.
steps.title: Pin the sun axle

steps.check: The ring gear is fixed to the board and does not rotate.
steps.instruction: Center R56 internal ring gear around H8 and fasten its outer mount holes at D8, H4, H12, and L8.

stack.label: Repeat this stack at D8, H4, H12, L8

steps.title: Mount R56 internal ring gear

steps.check: G1 spins cleanly before the carrier is added.
steps.instruction: Add S10 spacer, then place G1 on H8.
steps.title: Add G1 sun gear

steps.check: The carrier swings loosely around the sun axle.
steps.instruction: Place L2 from H8 toward H10 as the carrier.
steps.title: Add carrier link

steps.check: The planet axle travels with the carrier and rolls between sun and ring.
steps.instruction: Align the free carrier hole near H10, then fasten G3 through the carrier hole only (not the board) so it meshes with both G1 and R56 internal ring gear.
steps.title: Add G3 moving planet gear

steps.check: If the orbit binds, loosen the planet fastener and spacer stack.
steps.instruction: Hold the ring fixed and use the carrier end/handle hole to orbit the planet around H8.
steps.title: Rotate the carrier

steps.check: The crank axle is fixed to the board.
steps.instruction: Place the crank axle fastener at I5.
steps.title: Pin crank axle

steps.check: The crank rotates without scraping.
steps.instruction: Place L2 on I5 with its free hole near G6.
steps.title: Add crank link

steps.check: The rod joint is moving and is not pinned to the board.
steps.instruction: Fasten L6 to the crank free hole near G6, then point it toward G12.
steps.title: Add connecting rod

steps.check: The guide is fixed; only the slider block should move.
steps.instruction: Fasten the 3-hole bracket along G11, G12, and G13 as the straight guide.

stack.label: Repeat this stack at G11, G12, G13

steps.title: Fix slider guide

steps.check: The block travels along the guide as the crank turns.
steps.instruction: Fasten the 2-hole bracket to the free L6 end near G12 only (not the board).
steps.title: Add slider block

steps.check: If it binds, loosen the G6 and G12 moving joints.
steps.instruction: Rotate the L2 crank slowly; the slider block should move left-right along G11-G13.
steps.title: Turn crank and check slide
